name: churnguard-suite
description: Full-stack ChurnGuard Suite - React, Node, Python, Supabase

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend,MLEngine" -c "purple.bold,cyan.bold,yellow.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ml"
